assets.institution: Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History / NMNH Botany
assets.title: Aconitum bulbilliferum Hand.-Mazz. (Ranunculaceae, Type fragment)
assets.creator: Handel-Mazzetti, H. R. (collector)
assets.rights_basis: Smithsonian Open Access / CC0 1.0 — **dataset-level only**. The Smithsonian's Open Access release applies to the entire NMNH Botany dataset; no per-item licence field is rendered on the NMNH Botany record page. The dataset-level CC0 1.0 statement is the licence basis for this asset.
assets.credit_line: Aconitum bulbilliferum Hand.-Mazz., Handel-Mazzetti 5202, 17 Sep 1914 / Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History, US Catalog 1529703 / Smithsonian Open Access (CC0 1.0, dataset-level)
assets.source_note: NMNH Botany record: https://collections.nmnh.si.edu/search/botany/?ark=ark:/65665/31e002158-f911-411b-bbfb-63a2d207e920 ; specimen US Catalog 1529703.
assets.remaining_caution: The /media/?i=... endpoint serves a 90x90 PNG thumbnail. The high-resolution derivative URL was not exposed by the NMNH Ke Emu API at import time. Re-check inside v4.6 build and request a higher-resolution derivative via the NMNH IPT API if needed. Re-confirm the dataset-level CC0 1.0 statement on the live si.edu Open Access / Terms page before any publication.

assets.title: [Botanical Specimen: Fern]
assets.creator: Unknown (British)
assets.rights_basis: The Met Open Access — public domain designation. **Double-confirmation PASS**: (a) Met Collection API https://collectionapi.metmuseum.org/public/collection/v1/objects/285149 returns isPublicDomain: true; (b) the public object page displays a Public Domain indicator.
assets.credit_line: [Botanical Specimen: Fern], 1855–60 / The Metropolitan Museum of Art, Gift of Russell C. Vail, 2003 (2003.562.3) / Public domain
assets.source_note: The Metropolitan Museum of Art, object 285149 (accession 2003.562.3). Source: https://www.metmuseum.org/art/collection/search/285149
assets.remaining_caution: Credit line 'Gift of Russell C. Vail, 2003' was recorded in v4.4b evidence; not re-confirmed inside v4.5 download. Page build must verify before publishing. Used web-large derivative (1024 px on long edge) instead of original (3000+ px) to limit bandwidth.

assets.title: Zeestreepvaren

assets.rights_basis: Per-item Rijksmuseum Copyright field on the public object page reads verbatim 'Public domain' with a hyperlink to https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/mark/1.0/deed.en (CC0 1.0). Per-item evidence, not policy-level inference.
assets.credit_line: Zeestreepvaren, Anna Atkins, c. 1854 / Rijksmuseum, object RP-F-F80152 / Public domain (CC0 1.0)

assets.remaining_caution: Object type is photogram (cyanotype), not traditional print. Page build must label accordingly.
